programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter

programme.desc: In search of big nuggets, Rick buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time. Dustin's crew finds a claim, but must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred introduces a new miner.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Motherlode Mountain
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Rick decides between mining for gold and putting together his washplant, the Beets may have discovered the motherlode and Parker tests his new co-foreman.

programme.title: Gold Rush: There Will Be Gold
programme.desc: Rick races to get Monster Red running after losing his only way to mine gold. A bad storm shuts Parker down. The Beets fight to open a new cut. The Dakota boys bank their first gold hauls of the season.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: The Legend Returns
programme.desc: Pete and Mick's mining operation grinds to a sudden halt, while Col's Crew head underground and The Rookies are in despair until mentor, John Dunstan, steps in with a last-minute lifeline.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue: A Cub With a Kick
programme.desc: Northern Lights Shelter is housing a record number of black bears; Angelika works around the clock to try to save an orphan bear cub hit by a car; Thomas is charged with raising a fawn delivered by roadside C-section.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue: A Taste of Freedom
programme.desc: Angelika struggles to tranquilize two yearling bears at the shelter so they can be released, while Kim juggles bear care and a squirrely release.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Angelika attempts to rescue three cubs whose mother was shot, while Tanja and Kim head out to release two yearling bears and watch how instinct takes over.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue: Cub Trauma
programme.desc: Two traumatized cubs arrive at the shelter and Angelika employs a variety of approaches when each cub shows different signs of extreme stress.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue: Bearly Ready
programme.desc: Two yearling bears appear too attached to the volunteers to be released to the wild; Angelika must condition them to fear people.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue: Open Gate
programme.desc: Thousands of people visit the shelter's annual Open House and Angelika balances public relations while caring for an injured fawn.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 REDCREST Shotgun Round, La Crosse
programme.desc: The Shotgun Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour REDCREST, from La Crosse Wisconsin.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wine Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the Napa Valley and gets extremely dirty as he takes on the unappealing job of making wine. Mike then rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty at a Kansas Cattle Ranch where he gets a lesson on how dirty the cattle business can be.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Penguin Keeper
programme.desc: Mike Rowe joins a rowdy construction crew in California and learns the art of concrete stamping. Mike later takes care of some penguins and digs for bloodworms.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: A team of workers round up a flock of wild geese in the tundra, with airplanes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sheep Castrator
programme.desc: Mike works at an automobile dealership where the job is sawing down a giant concrete wall to make room for a new washbay, then heads to a sheep farm where he tries his hand at sheep shearing & castrating before getting treated to Rocky Mountain Oysters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tofu Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads out to California to spend a day at an electronic waste recycling plant, and then he jets off to Honolulu to learn how to make tofu.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Chicken Busters
programme.desc: Mike spends the day working with the Chicken Busters, chasing and catching feral chickens. Then he answers a fan letter about the familial bond often rooted within the jobs he works.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rum Distiller
programme.desc: Mike heads to Newport Distillery to help the crew turn molasses into rum. Scouring copper, working with scalding liquid, hauling hoses and lugging molasses cubes are all just part of a hard day's work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Line of Duty

programme.title: Long Island Medium on the Road: Texas

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Spirits of Hollywood

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Beyond the Read: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Did Not See This Coming
programme.desc: A group of women are visited by the best friend they lost, plus, Theresa's parents act as accomplices to bring peace to some friends.

programme.desc: In her search for her biological family, a DNA test reveals an unlikely family member, changing the woman's life forever.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: I Want to Go Back
programme.desc: At age 50, a man's adoption discovery catapults his search for his biological roots. His son's DNA only deepens the mystery. A woman asks Chris to help her find the son she placed for up for adoption, hoping her decision was not in vain.

programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.desc: Guy discovers homemade banana cream pie in Minnesota.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Kraut to Couscous
programme.desc: Guy looks for some global flavour favourites in small joints all across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Comfort
programme.desc: Guy travels to find feel good food including mofongo, one Guy's all time favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy gets the lowdown on some longstanding traditions. In Philadelphia, the Jamaican joint going all out authentic with the jerk chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed south of the border to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico. On the town's main drag, the taco joint that's turning out totally fresh octopus tacos and Guadalajaran-inspired sauces that'll knock your socks off.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Infusion
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub infused with international flavours. There's a meaty spot in Wilmington, Delaware, putting Thai into sausage and Cuban into sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Bites
programme.desc: Guy's rolling up to some joints pulling out all the stops. In New York's East Village, the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger is worthy of a four star review.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Full House for the Holidays
programme.desc: Tis the season to have a full house for the holidays and Jeff Mauro is ready with his crowd-pleasing Santa's sausage and snow strata brunch. The hosts share their tips for prepping the perfect meat and cheese board.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Italian
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her secrets and pro tips for Italian dishes. She starts with a fabulous two-fer, tomato eggplant soup, and the leftovers become baked pasta with tomatoes and eggplant.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Family and Friends Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Giada hosts a festive Thanksgiving for family and friends. The guests enjoy a menu of braised turkey braciole, bacon stuffing with radicchio and chestnuts, Brussel sprouts agrodolce and parmesan apple pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Trisha goes all out for the holidays with a Christmas sweater party. She creates a menu of cranberry pecan baked brie, fruitcake cookies, holiday deviled eggs, pigs in a wreath and festive punch.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Everyone Loves Food on a Stick!
programme.desc: The secret to Rachael Ray's Japanese-style skewers is the thick, sweet and savory sauce. She makes chicken yakitori, white rice and green beans with tofu and sesame sauce for a fast meal that pleases all ages.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Holidays
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling holiday questions, and the answers include outrageously cheesy lasagna dip and chips and a big festive salad perfect to take to any potluck bash. She covers make-ahead dessert questions with festive cinnamon apples.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Low-Carb Party Bites
programme.desc: Irresistible sausage stuffed mushrooms and make-ahead zucchini roll ups. Baked brie a la Ree and jalapeno cheese crisps. Finally, stunning salmon and cucumber bites and the simplest Spanish marinated olives.

programme.title: The Kitchen: 'Appy Holidays
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up bright ideas for sweet and savory bites perfect for any holiday party. Sunny Anderson creates a DIY carving station with her easy beef tenderloin with holiday pesto.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Southern Heart-to-Heart with Kelsea Ballerini
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites Kelsea Ballerini over to share stories from their journeys in country music. Kelsea represents the new wave of female country artists who, like Trisha and the trailblazing musicians before her, are empowering young women today.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Wine and Dine
programme.desc: Inspired by the bounty produced in nearby Sonoma and Napa counties, Guy Fieri asks his chef friends to make a meal with local wine as the star.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Trendsetting Turkey Day
programme.desc: In the first challenge, Jesse Palmer tasks the seven bakers with taking a beloved holiday appetizer to a whole new level with baked brie and jam mini pies.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard: Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: Casey Webb challenges three teams of Christmas bakers to create fantasy snow globe cakes that capture the magic and joy of the holidays. Each team uses ice sculpture to enhance the glitz and glam of their display and impress the judges.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Holiday Hustle: Blizzard Brawl
programme.desc: Five aspiring food truck teams kick off the season in snowy Wolfeboro, New Hampshire. Tyler Florence challenges the contestants with naughty and nice holiday ingredients, and they compete for sales while battling the elements in a winter wonderland.

programme.title: House Hunters: Engaged Couple Crafts Austin Oasis

programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Strangest

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Monster Inside: Robert Lopez
programme.desc: Robert Lopez served 10 years for nearly killing his first girlfriend. When his next girlfriend gave him reason to doubt her affection, he murdered her. He speaks about the source of his rage.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Gene Meredith: Devil Inside
programme.desc: In Great Falls, Mont., a 51-year-old corrections officer is found dead. This is the second random murder in six weeks. The detectives being the hunt for the killer in hopes to stop him before he hurts anyone else.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: One More Time
programme.desc: Mark Monson gets assessed by his sergeant for the second time. If he passes this time, he may begin to ride solo and get his own car. If he fails again, his dream of becoming a cop will be in jeopardy

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Command Presence
programme.desc: Amy has issues with German Shepherds and being attacked by a K-9 is part of training.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Riding Solo
programme.desc: Henry Conravey has successfully completed 12 weeks of field training but after a series of mistakes is not sure he'll be allowed to patrol the streets on his own. Chris Cade is looking forward to getting is own patrol car.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Size Doesn't Matter
programme.desc: Rookie Amy Hess proves size doesn't matter after finishing a week where she pushes a car and participates in her first SWAT hit. Tommie Tolbert tries to keep an arson victim from attacking the assailant's mother.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Yes, Master.
programme.desc: When an aspiring kindergarten teacher in Dublin, Ireland goes missing, her family assumes depression over her mother's death drove her to suicide. They never suspected the real reason – involving a twisted BDSM master gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Who Killed Christie Mullins?
programme.desc: When a 14-year-old is found bludgeoned to death, police in Clintonville, Ohio are quick to pin the heinous crime on a local vagrant. When a journalist reveals the man's alibi, the identity of the real killer will remain a mystery for decades.

programme.title: BTK: A Killer Among Us: Part One
programme.desc: The BTK announces his arrival by murdering four members of the same family; the body count continues to rise as his cat and mouse game begins and law enforcement struggles to catch him over three decades.

programme.title: BTK: A Killer Among Us: Part Two
programme.desc: Police finally capture the elusive serial killer, exposing his other life as a devoted family man; the depth of his sick obsessions is revealed, along with the impact on his victims, law enforcement, the city of Wichita, and his own family.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: BTK: A Killer Among Us: Part One
programme.desc: The BTK announces his arrival by murdering four members of the same family; the body count continues to rise as his cat and mouse game begins and law enforcement struggles to catch him over three decades.

programme.title: BTK: A Killer Among Us: Part Two
programme.desc: Police finally capture the elusive serial killer, exposing his other life as a devoted family man; the depth of his sick obsessions is revealed, along with the impact on his victims, law enforcement, the city of Wichita, and his own family.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Who Killed Christie Mullins?
programme.desc: When a 14-year-old is found bludgeoned to death, police in Clintonville, Ohio are quick to pin the heinous crime on a local vagrant. When a journalist reveals the man's alibi, the identity of the real killer will remain a mystery for decades.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Beneath the Stairs
programme.desc: Curiosity overcomes new homeowners when they spot a barrel in a crawlspace. When they open it, they are horrified to find a body.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Secret Code
programme.desc: A single footprint is the only clue when Hal Charboneau is found stabbed to death in his Portland home. When police learn of a bitter divorce and custody battle, they question his ex-wife. But they soon discover that Hal is not the only murder victim.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: What My Mother Knew
programme.desc: Every week Janine Sutphen went to symphony practice. One night, she didn't come home. Her husband reveals to police there's more to this housewife than anyone knew. But very quickly a secret comes out- leading investigators down a dark, twisted path.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: A Curve in the Road
programme.desc: Wendy Kratzert's van appears to have skidded off the road, but upon a closer look, it's clear this is a homicide. As detectives trace their victim's last steps, they begin to unravel secrets in one of the strangest cases that they've ever come up against.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Bottom of the Stairs
programme.desc: Detectives called to the home of Ken and Kristine Fitzhugh learn that what was once considered an accidental fall is now being investigated as a homicide. They soon find themselves on the hunt for the real scene of Kristine's death... and for her killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: This Bullet's for You
programme.desc: A couple from Michigan realizes a long held dream when they relocate to Florida, but their life in the sun is destroyed when they get into a fatal conflict with their neighbour.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line

programme.desc: Homeowners Chris and Melissa call on Designer/Engineer Chip Wade to transform two dated rooms into one massive great room, complete with a play area for their two young daughters.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Refreshing Modern Residence
programme.desc: Raf and Paige remodel a tiny two-bedroom house won at auction. Raf finds stainless steel cabinets in the kitchen and plans to repurpose them to be used in another part of the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Black and White Beauty
programme.desc: Paige talks Melinda into bidding on a three-bedroom, one-bathroom home at auction. The ladies improve the small, unimpressive space with an addition and some smart decorating ideas.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Storage Friendly Family Home
programme.desc: Paige and Raf revamp a small two-bedroom cottage they won at auction. They increase the home's size and alter the floor plan to make family-friendly living spaces.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Upscale Salvage
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win a three-bedroom, one-bathroom home with a nonsensical layout. They improve the flow of the house by building a large master suite addition. The home's modern update is completed with a revamped kitchen and dining room.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Industrial Home
programme.desc: Casey wins a tiny home at auction but is disappointed with the condition of the interior. Catrina and Zack help him upgrade the house by building an addition to increase the square footage and installing high-end industrial finishes.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Kid Friendly Home
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina upgrade a three-bedroom house won at auction. They enlarge the home's footprint by building an addition and reconfigure the layout to carve out kid-friendly spaces.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Wraparound Ranch Home
programme.desc: The Hayhurst Brothers score a problematic three-bedroom, two-bathroom home at auction. The house lacks a master suite and the chimney must be demolished before the structure can be relocated.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Miss America
programme.desc: The Miss America Pageant is making its triumphant return to Atlantic City, and four talented cupcake bakers vie for the chance to have their cupcakes at the centre of the action.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes for the Queen
programme.desc: It will be a British Invasion of the sweet kind when four English bakers fight for the chance to have their cupcakes featured at an exclusive party celebrating Queen Elizabeth's Diamond Jubilee.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes on Parade
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for cupcakes as four bakers compete for the opportunity to serve their cupcakes at a VIP party for the Magnificent Mile Lights Festival Parade in Chicago.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: We're Nuts for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Holiday Baking Championship kicks off as 10 competing bakers take on a nutty chocolate dessert in the first challenge and beautifully-decorated holiday pies in the main heat.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Craftiness
programme.desc: This week, it's time to get crafty! The remaining nine bakers attempt to amp up the visual impact of holiday baked goods as they create festive candy cane and holiday wreath desserts.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Stuffing Is the Best Part
programme.desc: The eight remaining bakers begin by making their best holiday whoopie pies that evoke a randomly-assigned theme of turkey, pumpkin, Pilgrims or fall foliage. Then, they must create stuffed holiday cakes that reveal a surprise center when sliced open.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving's Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers get creative with Thanksgiving-inspired desserts, and in the first round, their sweets feature canned cranberry sauce. Then, in the main heat, the bakers must invent a dessert highlighting their assigned harvest ingredient.

programme.title: Bake You Rich: Pie in the Sky
programme.desc: One competitor has a creative spin on an Italian favourite while another draws on French inspiration with a rustic macaron. Buddy is left having to decide if it's a savoury dessert or a pie that should be available to all of America.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Global Goodies
programme.desc: The world gets a little smaller when host Alfonso Ribeiro shares the secrets behind globally-inspired goodies. See how Jarlsberg cheese gets its holes and why the Idaho Candy Company made a confection shaped like a potato.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Colorful Candies
programme.desc: From delightfully twisted Red Vines to the multicolored Mike and Ikes and multi-flavored Jelly Bellies, join us for a Willy Wonka style tour of treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Melting Pot
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a made-in-the-USA, multicultural menu. A family-run Philadelphia factory for the secrets of an authentic Italian cannoli.

programme.title: Food Network Kitchen Cooks

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pasta, Tacos and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts his search for great bites on wheels in Venice Beach, Calif., at the Prince of Venice, a food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Tacos, Drumsticks and Stuffed Waffles
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts off in Nashville, where chef Danny Bua is packing unique flavour combinations into soft tortilla tacos on That Awesome Taco Truck. Brad tries the '80s throwback taco with a cheese quesadilla base as well as a lobster roll taco.

programme.title: Food Network Kitchen Cooks
programme.desc: Food Network Kitchen Cooks showcases the incredible variety of talent and recipes available to cook along with and discover on the Food Network Kitchen App.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: State Fare
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a road trip around the US to uncover the stories behind our favorite state plates, including what baked Alaska has to do with Alaska, who put the Big Apple in New York cheesecake.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Carnie Knowledge
programme.desc: Michael McKean juggles carnival classics with stories that will amaze and astound. His big top tales include whether cotton candy is at the root of a cavity conspiracy, if popcorn kernels saved the silver screen.

programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Supercuts

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?
programme.desc: Pete Lee reveals how millennials cure glaucoma, Michelle Buteau becomes a guidance counselor, and Matthew Broussard unmasks a German techno DJ in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: I Hate Myself
programme.desc: On this show, we learn three things: don't let Mo Amer call 911, don't ask Jenny Zigrino how you look, and never let Mo Mandel speak to the audience.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 14
programme.desc: Featuring a countdown of some of the dumbest acts on stage. Performers from a lion tamer to a woman with a special talent, each one is special in their own way.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 17
programme.desc: From an underwear clad girl giving a sobriety test, to amateur fireworks technicians, plus a funeral home Christmas greeting, these dumb performers shine in the roles they were both to play.

programme.title: Movie: The Replacements
programme.desc: Replacements are brought in to substitute for a team of striking football players.

programme.desc: In what could be their last case as partners, Jake and Charles go to great extremes to apprehend a local bike thief. Terry shockingly isn't in the lead for 'Mr. Nine-Nine' (the detective who has solved the most cases), leaving Road to boost his ego.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Your Honor
programme.desc: Captain Holt's mom seeks support from the precinct after her house is robbed. Meanwhile, Terry, Rosa and Boyle remodel the breakroom and Amy teaches Gina how to change her own car tire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.desc: Edward and Bella's unborn child is a risk to the citizens of Forks and to the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: The Volturi are in uproar upon learning of the birth of Edward and Bella's child, Renesmee. In order to protect the innocent child from destruction, the Cullens and the wolves come together in battle.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fire Escape
programme.desc: When devastating wildfires erupt in their neighborhood, the family is forced to flee from their homes, threatening to ruin the fairytale birthday party Rob is planning for his daughter. Kim awaits the president's word on her prison reform legislation.

programme.title: To Be Announced

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Survival Guide
programme.desc: Host Jesse Palmer offers tips for surviving holiday madness while sharing highlights, including amazing desserts and hilarious banter, from five seasons of Holiday Baking Championship competitions.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: Three runners-up from previous Holiday Baking Championship competitions are back, and all they want for Christmas is a second chance to win.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Naughty Or Nice
programme.desc: Three bakers run the gamut from naughty to nice as they vie to create the definitive gingerbread showpiece. The competitors receive a competition curveball mid-challenge that requires them to switch gears.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Elf
programme.desc: Three bakers are challenged with creating a gingerbread scene inspired by the classic holiday movie 'Elf.' Host Marcela Valladolid throws a wrench in the works by challenging the bakers to create quick holiday treats for the judges to sample.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Santa's Most Incredible Workshop
programme.desc: Three bakers find fierce competition as they race to create their take on a magical gingerbread 'North Pole'. They're thrown a twist and have to think fast to create a holiday treat that's both delicious and a practical part of their final creations.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Ultimate Holiday Celebration
programme.desc: Our three finalists go all out to see who can create their biggest 'Ultimate Holiday Celebration' scene. Each baker pulls out all the stops and incorporates their own personal touches to their elaborate creations as well as holiday treats for the judges.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Merry Xtras: Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Five fantastic cookie makers enter the workshop, but instead of a winter wonderland, they find host Eddie Jackson lounging in a beach chair under a palm tree. The bakers are challenged to create cookies perfect for a Christmas in the tropics.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Picture-Perfect Christmas

programme.title: Martina's Table: Listening Party
programme.desc: Martina McBride makes a buffet of delicious dishes to accompany a listening party for her latest album. She's making pot roast sliders and garlic roasted shrimp with green goddess dressing and mashed potato salad.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Holiday Leftover Brunch
programme.desc: Holiday dinner transforms into a jaw-dropping brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's house! His festive menu features egg and ham empanadas with a piquillo pepper sauce, cinnamon-maple-oat biscotti with a yogurt dip and red velvet hot chocolate.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Christmas at the Ranch
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to bring some yuletide joy to the ranch. Marc Murphy makes a rich braised endive with chestnuts in brown butter and cooks lobster Americaine with the Christmas spirits of brandy and vermouth.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Jet Lag Dinner
programme.desc: After a week of non-stop travel, Valerie Bertinelli isn't sure what time zone she's in, so she decides a sweet and savory breakfast-for-dinner will make a nice homecoming to share with her husband, Tom.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is coming and it's a big day on the ranch. It's all about festive food, fun and family traditions. Ree Drummond's celebrating the holidays by cooking up divine cinnamon rolls for Christmas gifts, and her little elves.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a cocktail bash for the crew helping to open her store in town. There's a delicious line up of make-ahead portable canapes on the menu.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Party in the Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is stocking the fridge with some make-ahead dishes for a cocktail party, including Chicken Satay with Peanut Sauce and a classic Spinach and Artichoke Dip with Salted Pita Wedges.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Cocktail Party
programme.desc: Ree has invited a crowd of friends and family over to Drummond Ranch for a festive holiday get-together that she's putting together in no time at all.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Double Birthday Party
programme.desc: One of Molly Yeh's best friends is in town for their birthdays, so Molly is making her most-delicious party bites for the double celebration.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating Mothers, Daughters and Daughters-in-Law
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her friend, Suzanne, have always shared the bond of being mothers of sons, but now they have an opportunity to join the mother-daughter club. Valerie prepares a meal for Suzanne and her daughter-in-law.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Make-Ahead Entertaining
programme.desc: Ina Garten is entertaining, and she's taking the pressure off with all make-ahead dishes. She starts with two easy appetizers, mustard and gruyere batons and warm dates with blue cheese and prosciutto.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Thankful for You
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her daughter, Jade, host a holiday party for her friends. Jade helps prepare the menu, prep for the party and plan the activity of making homemade Christmas gifts for a teacher or coach.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Holiday Helpers
programme.desc: The kitchen helpline is open for the holidays and the team is ready to bring serious crowd pleasers like Sunny's hot ham and cheese wreath and Katie Lee's crispy artichoke hearts. Baker Dan Langan stops by to create savoury gingerbread people.

programme.desc: Linda is bored by Bob's tired attempts at Date Night and decides to sign up for flying lessons. When Bob won't join her, she becomes the target of 'Upskirt Kurt,' the most charming pilot in the air.

programme.desc: Peter promises to help a dolphin who then moves in with the Griffins and outstays his welcome.

programme.desc: Izuku's mind is swirling with feelings from his work study, so he goes talks to All Might about it and learns about All Might's fate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet with a former girlfriend who broke his heart, but he is in for a surprise when he discovers that she is now a man named Bill. After managing to overcome his shock, Charlie's new friendship is jeopardized when Bill dates Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Like Buffalo
programme.desc: When Jake imitates one of Charlie's sexist remarks, Judith's support group decides that Charlie's home is an unfit environment for the child. Charlie is forced to cajole the group into letting Jake continue to spend the weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Does This Smell Funny to You?
programme.desc: Charlie unknowingly sleeps with an elderly man's hot, young trophy wife.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Those Big Pink Things With Coconuts
programme.desc: Evelyn takes drastic measures to get back into the lives of her sons and grandson.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab
programme.desc: Alan leaves Jake at Evelyn's for a disastrous sleepover and winds up partying with Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity
programme.desc: Though Charlie despises his sharp-tongued, passive aggressive mother, he's strangely attracted to Lydia, an attractive, blonde high-end real estate agent, just like his mother. Unfortunately, the similarities don't end there.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smooth as a Ken Doll
programme.desc: As Judith and Herb's wedding nears, Charlie gets a bit too close to Herb's witty sister.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aunt Myra Doesn't Pee a Lot
programme.desc: Alan prepares Jake for Judith's wedding, while Charlie continues his fling with Herb's sister Myra.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Prostitutes and Gelato
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan must confront their 'daddy issues' when Evelyn's new boyfriend invites them to Las Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Is There a Mrs. Waffles?

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Fish in a Drawer
programme.desc: A CSI team investigates a mysterious death at Charlie's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: She'll Still Be Dead at Halftime

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Two Finger Rule

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Baseball Was Better With Steroids
programme.desc: Charlie starts to question his relationship with Chelsea when he hears that Mia is back in town. Meanwhile, Judith goes into labour and Charlie, Alan and Herb rush her to the hospital.

programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.desc: A week before an awards ceremony, Blanche, Dorothy and Rose each come down with a nasty flu, which compounds their arguing over who will win a prestigious award.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed Whackers

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham unlocks the secrets behind the world's weirdest events, from a bird-killing solar death ray to a monkey that's learned first aid.

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.desc: Learn how they make turf grass, beef jerky, wood chippers and bowling pins.

programme.desc: No holiday meal is possible without a trusty kitchen knife to get toughest culinary jobs done and the process to make one of the best requires cutting-edge technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is the biggest man-made structure on the planet and one of its biggest mysteries. Follow the scientific mission to reveal the ancient secrets of one of history's greatest empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.desc: Christine's life with abusive husband Shane is a constant cycle of fear, humiliation and violence. When she finally escapes with her kids, Shane sets off in pursuit, kicking off a series of terrifying and shocking events leading to a bloody conclusion.
