programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Secrets of a Country Store
programme.desc: As the last dry county in the state of Alabama, Clay County is a place stuck in time. When local bootlegger Billy Triplett and his wife turn up dead in the town of Barfield, locals suspect it must have had something to do with his illegal side-business.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Cowboys From Hell
programme.desc: When Diana Algar and Jose Molina are found brutally murdered in rural Hollenback Township, Pennsylvania, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Professor's Wife
programme.desc: When Ellen Robb's husband finds her murdered in their quiet suburban Philadelphia home, evidence initially points to a robbery gone wrong. But as police dig deeper into the couple's life, they learn the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Homicide City: Danger Comes Home
programme.desc: When 78-year-old, George Volz's family finds him hogtied and decomposing in his Philly row house, police turn to the neighborhood for help.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Homicide City: Bingham Street Blues
programme.desc: Northeast Philadelphia's Crescentville neighborhood is known for tranquility seldom seen in major cities. But when a mother, her boyfriend, and daughter are found slain at home, the community searches for answers.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: Body Cam: Officer Down
programme.desc: Officers find themselves pitted against a lone gunman holed up in a suburban home; the nerve of a rookie cop is tested when a routine stop on the highway goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn't save his life. It's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to follow the bloody trail of clues and piece together the victim's last moments.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing. Then When Kenda investigates the mysterious death of a successful dentist, the case gets personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Target Practice
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly. Then when a house is besieged by mysterious gunfire, Kenda enlists a team of specialists to trace the bullets' origin.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rescuing a Massive Barn, Finishing the Lincoln Cabin
programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Repurposing Every Beam From a Pennsylvania Bank Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a Pennsylvania Bank Barn in hopes of recovering the Long Beams and Huge Sleeper Logs that lay below. They are up against the weather, the machines malfunctioning and the weight of the logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fighting the Elements to Build a Well House, and Repairing a Damaged Log Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to their roots in Asheville, North Carolina. They have one day to build a log well house in the driving rain. Once it's up, they have to repair a severely damaged log home nearby.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Barnwood Miracle
programme.desc: The Mt. Olivet Church has been the heart of Pocahontas County, WV for 137 years. The old log structure is struggling to survive, so Mark and the guys are called in to take it down and restore it. As the job ends, the community pulls off a surprise ending.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room Predicament
programme.desc: Nicole's next project is restoring a historic mansion in the Summit district of St. Paul. Unfortunately, some key rooms have been completely ripped apart, and her first task is to rebuild the gutted powder room from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob loves Krabby Patties so much, he just can't help singing and dancing when he's around the delicious sandwiches.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock; SpongeBob must wait for a toy to arrive in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Curiosity/ House Pest
programme.desc: Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he pulls one too many practical jokes on Simon.When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Many Unhappy Returns
programme.desc: The TMNT must stop a persistent foe from shredding NYC, but problems arise when they split up to handle things.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Todd Scouts/Goyles, Goyles, Goyles
programme.desc: The TMNT need to learn how to listen and get in touch with nature in order to save Todd after he’s captured by a group of hunters.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: RBUK
programme.desc: A spirited kitty named Felicity has magical and majestic powers which she uses on adventures with her best friends in a mythic and unique world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars launch fever.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Small Carol/ Last Man Floating
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manor of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drac to the Future
programme.desc: The self-updating tome, The Monstroso Serioso, is on display at Hotel Transylvania. While looking at the book, Kitty Cartwright finds herself sucked into its pages. It's up to Mavis to retrieve Kitty by travelling into the past.

programme.title: Movie: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: A young orphaned boy raised by a community of subterranean, junk-collecting tinkers must save his friends from a nasty exterminator bent on wiping them off the map.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: You, Me and Fifi
programme.desc: Mickey seeks to win the love of Minnie’s feisty, little dog, Fifi.

programme.title: Movie: Garfield: The Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the self-absorbed, fat, lazy cat is jealous of the attention new dog Odie is getting from his owner, Jon. He decides to get rid of him, but soon feels guilty and must find a way to get Odie back.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 4
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy battles his nemesis using his wits, ingenuity and a host of gadgets.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis heads to the underworld to meet Krampus, hoping he can fix a thousand-year-old error that will allow Lydia to let everyone enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Rendezvous Point
programme.desc: Doza attempts to meet a Resistance pilot from his past. Meanwhile the pilot has been captured by the First Order.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: World's Best Mom
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill / Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Movie: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Ray, a working father of two, struggles to save his family when aliens invade Earth with the aim of destroying it. Ray comes to the defence of his children as the world deals with a force it has never known.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Lyra's Jordan
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua's world is upended by her long-absent uncle's return from the North, while the glamorous Mrs. Coulter visits Jordan College with a proposition.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: The Idea of North
programme.desc: Lyra arrives to her new life in London, determined to find Roger with Mrs. Coulter's help. The Gyptians continue their search for the missing children and the elusive Gobblers.

programme.title: Watchmen: This Extraordinary Being
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Room 104
programme.desc: Room 104 tells a different story about the characters who stay in this hotel room.

programme.title: War Dog: A Soldier's Best Friend
programme.desc: Commemorating the often-overlooked war heroes who risk their lives to save countless soldiers in peril, military dogs. Documenting the natural intelligence, physical capabilities and steadfast loyalty of these K9s.

programme.title: Movie: Little Fockers
programme.desc: A tightly wound father-in-law still has doubts about his son-in-law, even after 10 years of marriage to his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Lindsey Vonn: The Final Season
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles Lindsey Vonn competing in her final World Championship as well as depicting her rise from child prodigy to a four-time Olympic gold medalist.

programme.title: Movie: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: The prequel to the Hollywood classic, Planet of the Apes, begins in San Francisco when man's attempts to push the boundaries of science results in the rise of genetically modified apes who threaten to take over the world.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie: Van Helsing
programme.desc: A famed monster hunter must battle Count Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's Monster.

programme.title: Big Little Lies: The Bad Mother
programme.desc: Celeste is blindsided by Mary Louise. Bonnie contemplates a relief from her ongoing guilt.

programme.title: Big Little Lies: I Want to Know
programme.desc: Celeste questions Mary Louise about a tragic event from Perry’s childhood.

programme.title: HBO First Look: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at film productions.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.desc: On the day before her son leaves for college, Eve Fletcher has to deal with some inappropriate behavior in the workplace. Brendan runs into an ex-girlfriend at a party.

programme.title: Mrs. Fletcher: Free Sample
programme.desc: While Brendan gets settled at BSU, Eve finds herself torn between the fantasy world of internet porn and the prospect of a real-life date. Roy Rafferty gets into some trouble at the senior center.

programme.title: Movie: Moulin Rouge!
programme.desc: A popular courtesan working at the Moulin Rouge falls in love with a poet in 1899 Paris.

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Thank You for Smoking
programme.desc: A spokesman for the tobacco companies tries to be a role model for his 12-year-old son while putting a positive spin on cigarettes.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: A Good Woman
programme.desc: In the '30s, a Manhattan socialite travels to the Amalfi Coast to escape debts and her past indiscretions. There she meets a man who tries to help her back into high society.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Armour
programme.desc: Lyra and the Gyptians arrive in the North, and seek the help of the Witches' Consul, Texan aeronaut Lee Scoresby and an armored bear in service to the town.

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw
programme.desc: Comedian, actor, writer and producer Lil Rel Howery ('Insecure', 'Get Out') makes his HBO stand-up comedy debut in an uproarious hour-long special.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween
programme.desc: 40 years after he killed five people, Michael Myers escapes from a secure mental hospital and returns to his hometown to hunt down the one woman who escaped his rampage, but she's spent years anticipating and preparing for his inevitable return.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Back to Life
programme.desc: A terrible coincidence puts Miri back in the community's firing line as she becomes the key suspect in a new crime. Caroline and Oscar attempt to revive their relationship.

programme.title: Back to Life
programme.desc: After being locked in a cell once again, Miri gets out determined to tell her side of the story and to finally get the town on her side.

programme.title: Movie: Congo
programme.desc: After an expedition fails to return from the Congo, another expedition is put together to search for them. These new explorers discover a mysterious city and a tribe of bloodthirsty gorillas in the jungle.

programme.title: Shameless: Which America?
programme.desc: Liam gets to know his newfound family members as Frank revels in his new position in the Gallagher house. Lip looks for support as the pressures of fatherhood take their toll. Ian and Mickey make a decision about their future and Carol tries to woo Anne.

programme.title: Movie: Second Act
programme.desc: A talented but uneducated woman stuck in a low-paying job gets a call out of the blue for an interview with a well-paying company. After landing the job, she learns that it's due to a fake Facebook profile set up in her name that makes her look great.

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of the Christmas chaos, three moms decide to celebrate the holiday in a much more low-key and less stressful fashion this year, but their plans are disrupted when their respective mothers all unexpectedly decide to spend the holiday with them.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Faith. Hope. Love. Luck.
programme.desc: Ray brings Mickey to the FBI to turn himself in. Four months later when one of the police officers' heads turns up and Ray and his family are implicated in the murder, Ray finds his work with his therapist threatening to unravel.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: A Good Man Is Hard to Find
programme.desc: Ray must find a new way to get Detective Perry off his trail while reckoning with a personal loss. When Bunchy's pharmacy is under attack, he takes matters into his own hands and is catapulted into the public spotlight.

programme.title: Shameless: Which America?
programme.desc: Liam gets to know his newfound family members as Frank revels in his new position in the Gallagher house. Lip looks for support as the pressures of fatherhood take their toll. Ian and Mickey make a decision about their future and Carol tries to woo Anne.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo
programme.desc: In Thailand, a group of Christian aid workers recruit John Rambo to guide them up the Salween River to deliver medical supplies to the Karen tribe of neighbouring Burma (aka Myanmar).

programme.title: Movie: The Patriot
programme.desc: A pacifist is drawn into the American War of Independence against his will in order to protect his enlisted son.

programme.title: 100%: Julian Edelman
programme.desc: Follow Julian Edelman's journey from an injury in 2017 to a Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019: Week 12

programme.title: Movie: The Shadow
programme.desc: The Shadow must stop his nemesis who is out to exact revenge and achieve world domination.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift

programme.title: Movie: Road House

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Movie: Sicario: Day of the Soldado

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Katy is finally laid to rest and all of Knocknaree have come out for the funeral. The public and media pressure to find Katy’s killer is intense. Cassie gets a call from Sam about another dead body.

programme.title: Movie: The Equalizer 2

programme.title: Dublin Murders

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Despite Rob’s promise to Cassie that they won’t investigate Operation Vestal because of Rob’s intense relationship with Knocknaree — the long shadow cast by that August day when two children disappeared in the woods and were never seen again.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved

programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.desc: George and Angie begin looking forward to being empty nesters as Carmen prepares for college. Meanwhile Benny may face hard times.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's House Has Two Empty Wombs
programme.desc: In an effort to keep George from missing Carmen, Angie maintains her story that she's pregnant. Meanwhile, Vic introduces his young and beautiful fiancée to the family.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Testi-Lies for Benny
programme.desc: When Benny's mother, lawyer and the judge all turn against her, it's up to George to keep her out of jail.

programme.title: George Lopez: Sabes Gay, It's George's Fantasy Episode
programme.desc: George drinks a liquor shot with a worm still in it and hallucinates that he and Ernie are gay and about to be married to each other.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Thinks Vic's Fiancée Is Lion About Being a Cheetah
programme.desc: George seeks help from a popular reality TV game show in order to expose Vic's cheating, gold-digging fiancée.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Helps Angie's Wha-Positive Self Image
programme.desc: When Angie gets concerned about losing her looks, George asks his gorgeous young niece to tone down her sex appeal.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Grave Mistake Sends Him to a Funeral, Holmes
programme.desc: George's poor memory comes back to haunt him when Angie's mother passes away.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Joins the Neighborhood Wha-tcha and Raises the Vigil-ante
programme.desc: George and Angie have 'the talk' with Max when a sexual predator moves in the neighbourhood.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Is Maid to Be Ruth-Less
programme.desc: Much to Benny's dismay, George and Angie hire a maid who quickly cooks and cleans her way into George's heart.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Is Lie-able for Benny's Unhappiness
programme.desc: When the love of Benny's life returns to town, George builds a web of lies to keep them from reuniting.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Rocks to the Max and Gets Diss-Band-ed
programme.desc: In an episode directed by award-winning film actor, Andy Garcia, George tries to relive his high school days by teaching Max to play the guitar, but when Max moves on without his dad and joins a rock band, George wishes he could take it all back.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Smoking Mad at Benny and Develops an Oral Fixation
programme.desc: When Power Aviation institutes a smoking ban, Benny's nicotine withdrawals drive George to self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Bogey-ous Relationship With Vic Is Putt to the Test
programme.desc: Vic feigns fatherly love so George will play in a father-son golf tournament against his long time rival and son, Tony.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Christmas Show
programme.desc: The Tanners dream of a white Christmas in Colorado, but are snowed in at the airport.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups in a Jam/ Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants. It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Frozen Camp-Out/ Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are on a tropical island camping trip when a freak snowstorm hits.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Very Guppy Christmas!
programme.desc: Molly and Gil meet the familiar Mr. Claws and his horse Snowflake. Mr Claws and Snowflake come to the rescue when Mr. Groupers van gets stuck in the snow. The guppies experience their first sleigh ride.

programme.title: Ricky Zoom: Ricky's on a Roll/ Rock the Float
programme.desc: On his way to help DJ and his parents, Ricky gets stuck inside the adventure park Bike Sphere. DJ is asked to pull a Steel Awesome float for the Hero Day parade, but he doesn't know if he's strong enough.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Puplantis
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate, Arrby, steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew/ Pups Save an Ostrich
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Playdate With Magenta!
programme.desc: Blue’s friend Magenta is coming over today. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what Blue wants to do with Magenta. During our search for clues, we identify opposites and check out animal footprint with our friends Shovel & Pail.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Pups Winter Wonder Show
programme.desc: The Adventure Bay Snow-Show is in danger of being a no-show when Mayor Humdinger escapes with the feature act, Cap'n Turbot's performing penguins. It's up to the PAW Patrol, with Tracker's help, to return the penguins so that the show can go on.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Merry Playdate
programme.desc: With the help of festive friends, Ryan must deck the halls with 12 challenge victories to prepare for the hopeful arrival of the big guy himself.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Blaze Christmas
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping Santa and his elves load his magic bag full of presents when Crusher, who wants to open his present early, knocks it over, sending all the presents flying away! Now they have to rescue and deliver the presents before morning.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Balloon Pups/ Pups Save the Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger. The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider but get stuck in its web.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
programme.desc: A comet is coming, and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory! When the observatory starts rolling out-of-control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed in this Ultimate Construction Rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy the Pirate Presents the SpongeBob SquarePants Christmas Special
programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Quakes and Mountain Lions
programme.desc: Do you know how to survive a bone-jarring earthquake or escape a deadly ocean whirlpool? Intense, caught-on-camera video pits you against deadly power outages and hungry mountain lions!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Earthquakes and Blizzards
programme.desc: Video footage of deadly lightning, wicked winds and high-tides are featured. Also, what to do when forced to give birth in a blinding blizzard and how to survive a seismic shocker from 55 stories in the air.

programme.desc: It's lights, camera, disaster for local meterologists, couples have second thoughts when their wedding day goes awry, and bad weather rocks the boat for weekend sailors.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Poolitically Incorrect
programme.desc: Outdoor BBQ plans go up in flames, people literally find themselves on thin ice, and a sunny day at the pool isn't as relaxing as you think.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Wreck From Hell: Part One
programme.desc: Jamie goes to BC to save a tractor-trailer on its side, which turns out to be his worst nightmare.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Load of Problems
programme.desc: Gary's team fights to upright a battered trailer that is dangerously close to splitting open; a rookie takes his first shot as lead operator on the rotator under tough conditions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Janelle James Headlines
programme.desc: The always funny Janelle James headlines tonight. Plus, Blaq Ron gives a brief history lesson on line dancing, Kerry Coddett contemplates alternate styles of dating and Reggie Conquest has a PSA for kids.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Misery Index: You Better Watch Your Filthy Mouth
programme.desc: A bad wedding officiant and someone who sent inappropriate texts to their mom battle it for the grand prize.

programme.title: The Misery Index: So That's Murder Then?
programme.desc: Jameela shows us there are some things you don't want to find in your toilet. Saul shows us how to ruin a wedding. A pants-wetter and a forgetful husband battle for the chance at the grand prize.

programme.title: The Misery Index: That Milk Must Have Turned by Now

programme.desc: The Tenderloins witness the most embarrassing way to ruin a wedding.

programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Botched: Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems

programme.title: Botched: Boob-Watch
programme.desc: Former 'Baywatch' star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her implants that were too big. Terry tries to reconstruct a woman with flesh eating disease.

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: Like a Surgeon
programme.desc: A reality star seeks help to fix her botched boobs and stomach after her former plastic surgeon is allegedly killed by an unhappy patient. Paul fixes a pig-ish' nose and Terry struts his stuff with a celebrity impersonator.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Freak!
programme.desc: The doctors have their hands full with a personal trainer willing to go to extreme measures to remove a head scar, while a cancer survivor wants her botched reconstructive breasts to look natural again.

programme.title: Botched: Knuckles and Knockers
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow tries to separate a uniboob and Dr. Nassif fights to fix a former boxer’s nose. Plus, the Doctors deliver some unexpected news to actress and model Shauna Sand.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: Man Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a mother who looks like she's been pregnant for 12 years, Dr. Nassif takes on a woman who hasn't been able to close her mouth since college and the doctors meet with a gambler with a serious case of man boobs.

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Problems
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.desc: A UK patient with a duck butt and bulging belly forces Dr. Dubrow to perform a two-stage revision to restore her 24-year-old body. Meanwhile, another Brit needs Dr. Nassif's help to complete his K-Pop transformation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Party
programme.desc: Guy's roundin' up the ultimate pizza party all over the nation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Deep-Fried Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling across the country to dig deep into deep-fried favorites. From surf to turf and from appetizers to the main event, these sizzling sensations are too tempting to pass up.

programme.desc: Five aspiring food truck teams kick off the season in snowy Wolfeboro, New Hampshire. Tyler Florence challenges the contestants with naughty and nice holiday ingredients, and they compete for sales while battling the elements in a winter wonderland.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Apple's Short
programme.desc: Apple needs to be tall so that he can be in love.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Face Your Fears
programme.desc: Apple and Onion must face their fears while trapped in a pet shop, so they can save French Fry from facing hers.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Fun Proof
programme.desc: Apple and Onion want to become this week's 'Most Fun People.'

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Tips
programme.desc: Apple and Onion try to fit in to life in the big city.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Console
programme.desc: Elmore becomes trapped inside a fantasy RPG world when Gumball is given a cursed videogame console. Gumball, Darwin and Anais have to battle their way through town, unraveling the secrets of their new virtual reality and leveling up to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Awareness
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to be more green resulting in the school being overrun by vines.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Box
programme.desc: The Wattersons receive an unmarked package in the mail. To distract themselves from the urge to open it they all take turns to imagine what it might contain.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stink
programme.desc: Mr. Small goes feral after Gumball and Darwin expose his hypocrisy.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ad
programme.desc: The Wattersons are forced to rent their house to a pair of elderly fainting goats.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vase
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Understanding
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin get into trouble misunderstanding a new kid in school.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potato
programme.desc: After lunch with Idaho, Darwin decides to stop eating potatoes. When he finds it harder to kick his favourite carb habit than he thought, Gumball decides to try to help.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Spinoffs
programme.desc: Rob creates a variety of spinoff Elmore shows and formats in order to replace Gumball.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potion
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin use a magic potion to shrink Hector.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Intelligence
programme.desc: Technology reaches human intelligence then becomes dysfunctional as it picks up human flaws.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Transformation
programme.desc: Gumball is asked to settle a dispute between Penny and her family.

programme.title: American Dad!: Bazooka Steve
programme.desc: Steve becomes the town pariah after he convinces the star quarterback of the arena football team to stop playing. Roger forces Hayley to become a cab driver to pay him back for her gambling debts.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: House of 1000 Bounces
programme.desc: When there is a bounce house crisis at Regular-Sized Rudy's birthday party, the Belcher kids devise a scheme to save the day. Meanwhile, Bob deals with an unexpected guest at the restaurant, and is forced to come to terms with a long-standing fear.

programme.title: Family Guy: Candy, Quahog Marshmallow
programme.desc: Peter, Cleveland and Joe come across an old VHS tape called 'Winter/Summer,' an Asian soap that Quagmire starred in when he was living in Korea. Unable to find the final tape of the series, the guys travel to Korea to find it.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Peanut Butter Kid
programme.desc: When their bank accounts begin to run dry, the Griffins look for ways to make money. Stewie gets cast in a peanut butter commercial and becomes the money maker for the family.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade

programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars

programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Dreams
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is fielding farm calls all over Isabella County now that the spring birthing season is in full swing.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: US Navy vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Evidence from a top-secret file reveals the unsolved mystery of an American aircraft carrier's strange encounter with a UFO, and a team of experts use the latest tech and a vital eyewitness to investigate the true story.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.
