programme.desc: Witness the shocking story of how two young Florida boys were led to kill their father.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Back from the Brink
programme.desc: Baton Rouge paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife. Gunshots fired in Yonkers send Ariel and Cunningham to save a man down. In Austin, first responders plead with a patient to go to the hospital.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Corporal Rich Emberlin and Corporal Robert Cockerill must charge into a house to nab a murder suspect who allegedly knifed his neighbour to death; in their off hours, Emberlin tries desperately to get his ex-girlfriend back and Cockerill gets in shape.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A star athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The young man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life and the events of his last night on earth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Timothy Peart's Last Dance
programme.desc: When a teen is killed at a party, police question the guests and wonder if they're all part of a cover-up. Then A reported suicide leaves Kenda with doubts. Did the victim take his life to end his troubles, or did his troubled past catch up to him?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: It's New Year's Eve weekend, and in the midst of the revelry Miguel Mendez is beaten to death outside a convenience store. Lt. Joe Kenda faces a challenging investigation, his only clues coming from a drunken witness and Miguel's strange injuries.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff's deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight. When he's found dead in his patrol car the next morning, his fellow lawmen must set aside their grief and hunt down his killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Widow's War
programme.desc: A marine colonel fatally wounded in Iraq was said to have died by suicide, but his wife claims it was murder. See the story of a family's quest to change the medical examiner's findings in a case that tests convincing and competing forensic theories.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Widow's War
programme.desc: A marine colonel fatally wounded in Iraq was said to have died by suicide, but his wife claims it was murder. See the story of a family's quest to change the medical examiner's findings in a case that tests convincing and competing forensic theories.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: Just hours after a popular teenager is reported missing, her lifeless body is discovered under a nearby bridge. Police will have to sort through her puzzling last hours alive to bring a ruthless killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No GoodByes
programme.desc: A mother arrives home to have lunch with her teenage daughter and walks into a nightmare she will never forget.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Without a Trace
programme.desc: When 29-year-old Carrie Olson doesn’t show up for work and is reported missing, an entire community pulls together in the search. Detectives suspect foul play and soon focus their investigation on two men in her life.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: A woman's truck explodes outside of her workplace and terrorism is suspected. Her family may not appear to be picture perfect.

programme.title: Dateline: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: In a quiet Southern town, police find a prominent lawyer brutally murdered and his girlfriend bound in duct tape. Investigators pursue a long list of leads, until they zero in on a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: A husband comes home to find his wife stabbed to death in their home. With little hard evidence to work with, detectives began digging into the couple's complicated past.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Midnight Murders
programme.desc: Carla Stefaniak, a spirited Florida insurance agent with a passion for travel, heads to Costa Rica. But on the day she's supposed to return, she vanishes. And in 2014, 19-year-old college student Pravin Varughese disappears after a party.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Up and Away
programme.desc: Nicole puts a modern twist on the 1904 Summit Mansion in St. Paul when she installs an elevator in the middle of the home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Living Alaska: High-Flying Adventure

programme.title: Living Alaska: North Pole Pursuit

programme.title: Living Alaska: Backyard Bears in Palmer

programme.desc: Stewart Cogswell received a job offer in Alaska and is eager to move his wife De Anna and their four teenagers out of their hometown of Marinette, WI, and into an Alaskan dream home.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Treasure Hunting
programme.desc: Rob and his right-hand man, Wes, are on a treasure hunt for their next project in Palm Beach, Florida. They check out four properties, but they all need a ton of work. After a scary situation leaves them spooked, the choice is clear.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: After surveying the property and running the numbers, Rob determines they have to start from scratch. It becomes a race against time as he and the crew only have 90 days to demo and rebuild the shell.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Pool Problems
programme.desc: At Rob's latest project, the current state of the pool spells disaster. It's small and square, not to mention filthy, so Rob designs a whole new look for this outdated eyesore to make it pool party-worthy.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Icing on the Kitchen
programme.desc: The current kitchen at Rob's project in Palm Beach lacks the space and grace that Rob is looking for. He and the ninjas come up with a plan to give the heart of the home a full face lift with plenty of bling.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tree Lighting
programme.desc: Four talented cupcake bakers compete for the chance to have their delicious displays featured at a star-studded holiday tree lighting ceremony in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Italiano
programme.desc: Noah tries a clever calzone-Lasagna hybrid and a special pizza and pasta combo.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'tis The Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brew-Haha
programme.desc: From pulled pork and wings to beer floats, we're hitting up bars where food is the star.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Ooey Gooey Greatness

programme.title: Simply Laura: Laura's Leftovers
programme.desc: There is nothing more fun and creative than making a new meal from yesterday's leftovers. Laura demonstrates her tricks for turning everyday leftovers into a delicious meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Lessons From Nonna
programme.desc: Laura's passion for food and cooking was inspired by her Italian grandmother, who taught her not only how to cook, but how to spread love through food. Today Laura takes you on a very personal journey through her some of her Nonna's favorite dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Date Night
programme.desc: Laura creates a date-night dinner at home from fresh ingredients, without a hefty price tag. Seared New York Strip steak takes center plate, but no steak dinner is complete without the sides, and no date night complete without flowers.

programme.title: Simply Laura: 15-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Laura has a busy day and only has 15 minutes for each of her meals.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Game Night
programme.desc: Laura Vitale hosts a casual game night. Everyone has a job to do, including Papa Sal, who joins Laura to prepare his spicy steamed mussels. Her guests make their selections from the classic Italian antipasti and enjoy short rib and béchamel lasagna.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Style
programme.desc: Entertaining friends and family should be fun, but it isn't always the case. Laura shows us her secret to an impressive and stress free family meal.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Open House Brunch
programme.desc: An open house style brunch includes orange spiced crumb cake and creamy scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A French Countryside Picnic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's in the mood for a brunch-style picnic in the style of the French countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tasty Trattoria Brunch
programme.desc: Decadent cinnamon mascarpone pancakes with warm morello cherries and hazelnut.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay knows that cheese makes everything better, and brunch is no exception. He serves up some cheese-filled dishes like Meyer lemon ricotta crepes with candied almonds, a frittata with thyme roasted potatoes, smoked mozzarella and tomato-basil.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cuisine du Jour
programme.desc: Bobby whisks us away to the South of France as he cooks up a delicious brunch menu inspired by one of his favorite places. All good French food is accompanied by a Baguette and Bobby toasts his with Goat Cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tuscan Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby creates an awesome menu inspired by one of his favourite places - Tuscany.

programme.title: Good Eats: 'Twas the Night Before Good Eats

programme.desc: While house-sitting on Christmas Eve, Spider-Man is forced to team up with Moon Knight to defend the home from the new Mysterio.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Jingle Bell Rock
programme.desc: The team stages a Christmas carol inspired con job in order to frighten a despot out of his ill-gotten riches and free his enslaved people.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Unfortunate Son
programme.desc: Quill must bust his father in order to save the Guardians from the ruthless Korvac.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: The Road to Goblin War
programme.desc: Spider-Man must take down the slick new villain, Slyde, as he steals various chemicals from around the city in effort to create a deadly virus that could wipe out New York.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Rendezvous Point
programme.desc: Doza attempts to meet a Resistance pilot from his past. Meanwhile the pilot has been captured by the First Order.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Voxx Vortex 5000
programme.desc: The Colossus is running out of money. Hype takes the Aces to race at Vranki’s Casino, run by Vranki the Hutt, hoping to win big… or lose everything.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Outta Time/Our Homespun Melody
Mickey Mouse Shorts: Outback at Ya!/ A Pete Scorned/Two Can't Play
Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium / Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast? / Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis heads to the underworld to meet Krampus, hoping he can fix a thousand-year-old error that will allow Lydia to let everyone enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Art of the Blade
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Superior

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: The Battle of AmfAR
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Taylor and Dr. Mathilde Krim and their pioneering efforts creating the American Foundation for AIDS Research (amfAR).

programme.title: Movie: Jobs
programme.desc: Explores the life and career of college dropout and creative entrepreneur, Steve Jobs.

programme.title: Movie: Head Full of Honey
programme.desc: A grandfather suffering from Alzheimer's disease puts a strain on his son's marriage with his deteriorating condition, but his granddaughter is determined to help him. Without telling her parents, she runs off with her grandfather to Venice.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Armour
programme.desc: Lyra and the Gyptians arrive in the North, and seek the help of the Witches' Consul, Texan aeronaut Lee Scoresby and an armored bear in service to the town.

programme.title: Movie: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: To her family's displeasure, a young girl falls in love with an orphaned woodcutter. The couple plans to run away together until they learn that her sister has been killed by a werewolf terrorizing their village.

programme.title: Very Ralph
programme.desc: 'Very Ralph' is the first documentary portrait of fashion icon Ralph Lauren, revealing the man behind the icon and the creation of one of the most successful brands in fashion history.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own
programme.desc: Reclusive trillionaire Lady Trieu finally enters the stage with a mysterious offer. With Blake getting closer to the truth of her coverup, Angela enlists Looking Glass for help. Meanwhile, the Lord trains two new servants.

programme.title: Watchmen: Little Fear of Lightning
programme.desc: The origin story of Looking Glass is at last revealed, as is the truth behind the greatest hoax in American history. Far away, the Smartest Man in the World plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Watchmen: This Extraordinary Being
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Right
programme.desc: A young woman falls in love with a seemingly perfect guy, except he has one major flaw: he's a professional assassin. As the criminals who employ him start to come after him, she must decide if she'll run away or join in the mayhem.

programme.title: Movie: Tanner Hall
programme.desc: Four teenage girls learn about life while living in an all-girls boarding school in New England.

programme.title: Movie: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: A pitcher reflects back on his life and career as he works on throwing the perfect game.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes the Field
programme.desc: Comedy superstar Will Ferrell appears at five different spring training ballparks in Arizona, he plays every position on the field for 10 different teams on the same day.

programme.title: Movie: Bicentennial Man
programme.desc: A robot tries to become human when he realizes that he has emotions and creative thoughts.

programme.title: Movie: Pan

programme.title: Movie: Wall Street: Money Never Sleeps
programme.desc: A young Wall Street trader partners with a disgraced, former trader to alert the financial world of the impending doom.

programme.title: Movie: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: A team of bomb technicians with only a few days left on their tour of Iraq, struggle to control their reckless new sergeant. The new leader puts the excitement of urban combat ahead of the safety of his men, forcing them into deadly situations.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive

programme.title: Back to Life
programme.desc: A terrible coincidence puts Miri back in the community's firing line as she becomes the key suspect in a new crime. Caroline and Oscar attempt to revive their relationship.

programme.title: Back to Life

programme.title: Shameless: Which America?
programme.desc: Liam gets to know his newfound family members as Frank revels in his new position in the Gallagher house. Lip looks for support as the pressures of fatherhood take their toll. Ian and Mickey make a decision about their future and Carol tries to woo Anne.

programme.desc: Ray gets closer with Molly Sullivan when he realizes their family connection. Claudette comes to New York and discovers that Daryll is on Detective Perry's radar. Bunchy tries to leverage his heroism for a pay raise. Terry goes on a trip.

programme.title: Shameless: A Little Gallagher Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: Frank and Mikey set off on a day of adventure around the city in pursuit of Mikey's dreams. Debbie discovers a new way to make money in the midst of a strike as Lip leans on his new friend for parenting advice. Carl gets more than he bargained for.

programme.desc: Krystal Stubbs doubles down on her husband's dreams while he wrestles with leaving his job. Cody loses a friend, but meets his hero.

programme.title: Movie: Moon

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: A Very British Christmas
programme.desc: Stranded in a remote English village, an American opera singer must choose between her career and love.

programme.title: Movie: The Nutcracker: The Untold Story
programme.desc: In 1920's Vienna, a little girl's godfather gives her a special doll on Christmas Eve. This nutcracker comes to life and takes her into a magical fantasy world.

programme.title: Movie: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: After his last few books have flopped, author Charles Dickens is desperate for a hit. When the inspiration for 'A Christmas Carol' strikes, the characters seem to come to life before his eyes as he tries to get the book written in only a few weeks.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute fourth-grade teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: Den of Thieves
programme.desc: After a series of daring bank heists are staged across Los Angeles, an elite unit is tasked with tracking down the group responsible, but the criminals are planning their biggest heist yet: robbing the Los Angeles branch of the Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: After being dumped by her future husband, an unconventional educator sets out to marry a rich substitute teacher. While battling for his attention and being pursued by the gym teacher, she teaches her class, and everyone else a unique type of lesson.

programme.title: Movie: Hulk

programme.desc: Circumnavigation of the globe by helicopter.

programme.title: Showbiz Korea
programme.desc: The latest news about Korean celebrities and the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Nazis on Drugs: Hitler and the Blitzkrieg
programme.desc: The story of a World War II Nazi scheme to provide methamphetamine to German soldiers to make them invincible. This vast conspiracy is sourced right from rare historical records secured by the Allies after the war.

programme.title: Bill O'Reilly on Newsmax TV
programme.desc: Bill O'Reilly joins Newsmax TV to discuss the James Comey Hearing and more.

programme.title: Michelle Malkin Investigates: Sanctuary Cities
programme.desc: Illegal aliens convicted of heinous crimes are set free to roam the streets. We talk to Brian McCann whose brother was murdered by a convicted illegal alien, & hear his pleas to lawmakers to enforce immigration policy. We also hear from experts.

programme.title: Secret Access: The Vatican
programme.desc: Take a revealing look at the inner workings of the Vatican including the secret archives, the Swiss guards, and many other secrets that are locked inside.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Hitler's Blood Oath
programme.desc: Hitler is the most notorious madman in history, he was a murderer and a racist as well as a dictator, but was he also a prophet? How did his visions and behaviours lead him to take over the world?

programme.title: JFK Declassified: The New Files
programme.desc: Bob Baer explores the government documents released on October 26, 2017, comparing them with the discoveries made during 'JFK Declassified: Tracking Oswald.' More details on America's complex relationship with Russia and Cuba's secrets are provided.

programme.title: The Men Who Killed Kennedy: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Explore the new details, and the countless questions regarding the death of John Fitzgerald Kennedy, our 35th president.

programme.title: Nazis: Ultimate Evil
programme.desc: The atrocities of the Nazi party required a vast network of evil; from the intellectual elite who legitimized Hitler's ideas to the public, to the desk-jockeys who carried out his orders with ruthless efficiency.

programme.title: Nostradamus: 21st Century Prophecies Revealed
programme.desc: Innovative analysis gives us the chance to finally crack Nostradamus's cryptic code. The emerging truth is that Nostradamus may indeed have possessed a special gift that made his predictions so accurate, but it's something we may all be able to tap into.

programme.title: In Search of Atlantis
programme.desc: With Plato's ancient writing as his guide, an epic 2-part journey begins to find the lost civilization of Atlantis, and proof that it was a real empire. The search includes the Palace of Knossos in Crete, and the fabled island of Sardinia.

programme.title: Huckabee
programme.desc: Join Mike Huckabee for no agenda news, positive entertainment and everyday stories that inspire.

programme.title: War Room: Impeachment
programme.desc: Political strategist Steve Bannon hosts this live, daily show, where viewers gather to make sense of the noise surrounding the impeachment inquiry.

programme.title: The Brett Winterble Show
programme.desc: Brett Winterble talks about what's interesting in a funny and insightful way.

programme.title: The Brett Winterble Show
programme.desc: Brett Winterble talks about what's interesting in a funny and insightful way.

programme.title: Liquid Lunch With John Tabacco
programme.desc: Markets, news, and politics shaken and served with a twist everyday LIVE on Newsmax!

programme.title: Liquid Lunch With John Tabacco
programme.desc: Markets, news, and politics shaken and served with a twist everyday LIVE on Newsmax!

programme.title: America Talks Live
programme.desc: The biggest stories of the day are discussed with viewers across the nation. Whether it's over the phone, video cam or social media, the voice of Americans can be heard live across the nation.

programme.title: This Just in With Robin Hamilton
programme.desc: Robin Hamilton covers local issues in the Washington, D.C area.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: John Hancock's Hancock
programme.desc: An item from the real John Hancock comes in and the guys are not sure how to price it; an allegedly authentic Indiana Jones whip is brought it but it all comes down to Harrison Ford.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Peaches and Pinups
programme.desc: Corey has a chance to buy a crossbow that has not been fired in almost 40 years; will it still be in working condition? Rick blushes when a woman tries to sell her husband’s Playboy collection; will he purchase or pass on this one?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fired Up
programme.desc: The guys want to buy an airplane propeller that may be tied to Charles Lindbergh, but they need to find some documentation or an expert to confirm these findings.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel head out to Long Island after her father has a heart attack.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Princess Consuela
programme.desc: Phoebe considers changing her name to something more exotic; Joey has abandonment issues.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Batwoman: A Mad Tea-Party
programme.desc: Kate and Alice continue their sister/nemesis dance, while Alice and Mouse construct their most evil plan yet. Mary invites Kare to a special event honouring Catherine, and Jacob makes a decision that leaves Kate perplexed.

programme.title: Supergirl: The Wrath of Rama Khan
programme.desc: Supergirl’s struggle against Leviathan reaches a boiling point as she faces off against Rama Khan. Meanwhile, as Lena and Hope work to launch Project Non Nocere, Hope proves to be an invaluable asset to Lena.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Doodle
programme.desc: George finds a doodle that his girlfriend drew of him. Fleas force Jerry's parents stay in a fancy hotel, while the gas from the fumigation causes Kramer to be unable to taste peaches.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Fusilli Jerry
programme.desc: Kramer makes the most of his new license plates and creates a statue of Jerry out of fusilli pasta. Jerry is disturbed when he finds out his mechanic used his techniques on Elaine.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Estelle Dies
programme.desc: Rachel makes a startling announcement; Phoebe tries to conceal the death of Joey's agent.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throws her a farewell party.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Crime Ring
programme.desc: Max and Caroline are arrested for breaking into a cute guy's apartment to recover the rings Caroline left behind after she spent the night.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Knock Off Knockout
programme.desc: Max and Caroline get into a legal battle with two prep school teens who knocked off their cupcake T-shirts and are selling them.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Sylvester Stallone, Chloe Bennet, the cast of ‘The Wedding Year’, Ansel Elgort, Keke Palmer, Jessica Chastain, Michael Blackson, Jada Pinkett Smith, Helen Mirren, Olivia Wilde, and Khalid.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Dog's Best Friend
programme.desc: Gags include touchier screen technology, give me a hand, and sleeping baby race.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Teetering on Hysterics
programme.desc: Gags include the invisible tiger, ear fullacious, and how not to practice fire safety.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Moore vs. Moore
programme.desc: A woman says there are too many tell-tale signs for her to believe that her husband has given up his player ways.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Enjoy Your Stay/ Rideshare Shenanigans
programme.desc: Woman sues hotel manager over unexpected expenses; Man sues cousin over rideshare profits.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: You Keyed My Car/ Cracked Crystal Conflict
programme.desc: An argument over a parking spot leads to property damage; a housekeeper sues her employer over an injury.

programme.title: Right This Minute

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Campbell vs. McCier
programme.desc: He claims his ex-girlfriend took him for everything he had and now he’s in court to prove he did not father her nine-month-old son.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Sleepaway Camp Bully
programme.desc: A woman seeks reimbursement from a summer camp after her daughter is bullied.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff is a make-up artist who was hired to do the Defendant’s make-up for her wedding, but she failed to pay her, so she’s suing. The Defendant claims the Plaintiff was late and drinking and getting high on the job.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Lousy Landlording' and 'Rotten Roommate.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Candy Cane Lane/ Peace Out-fit
programme.desc: Trouble with holiday light display; dispute over change in employee uniforms.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Woman sues over fraudulent sale of cellphone and service fee; defendant claims it was her daughter who sold the phone. Then, a plaintiff sues over down payment for car and damages.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Loss Leaves Unanswered Questions
programme.desc: Nyasia was just a teenager when her father was murdered three years ago. The father left Nyasia and a three year old son behind. Now, questions have arisen as to whether or not the little boy is really her brother.

programme.title: Maury: Who's My Baby's Father .... My Husband or My Lover?
programme.desc: During her pregnancy, Valyncia's grandmother told her man he wasn't the father; now she needs a paternity test. Damario admits to being in love with two women with three babies; Damario believes they cheated. Alicia’s here to find her baby's father.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Lesbian Stepsisters Hook-Up
programme.desc: Cody lost touch with his summertime crush named Bobbi but hopes he can reconnect. His efforts prove to be too little too late once he finds out that Bobbi has moved on with someone else…and of all people, it’s with her stepsister Arielle!

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a father is searching all over town for a toy for his son. While his son is at home wondering where he is, the neighbour is hitting on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs

programme.title: Movie: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: A Greek girl falls in love with a non-Greek man, which creates havoc amongst her family.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: True Lies
programme.desc: A secret agent on the trail of a group of terrorists puts his family at risk when they discover his true identity.
